positive: A whimsical, geometric owl sitting among stylized floral elements and falling geometric leaves. The style is a blend of Art Deco and modern minimalist vector illustration, using a limited but vibrant color palette of teal, mustard yellow, burnt orange, and sage green. The composition is centrally balanced, featuring the owl as the main, serene subject with strong, clean silhouettes and decorative symmetry. The artwork should have thick linework, high contrast, and a flat graphic quality suitable for screen printing on fabric. Isolated on a clean white or very light beige background for maximum print versatility. Highly detailed, clean lines, vector art, graphic design, pop art influence.
